The '''Argazdan Riot Buster''' was a powerful type of [[sonic rifle]] that was used by the [[Argazdan/Legends|Argazdan]] during their rule over the [[Lorrdian/Legends|Lorrdians]] as a part of the [[Kanz Disorders/Legends|Kanz Disorders]]; at this time in history, non-lethal technology was a profitable commodity. This gun knocked its targets over and stunned them; it had a range of twenty-eight meters.

{{Weapon-stub}}

*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
